snippet.textDisplay:
Gaming Performance Across the HORIZON 20 Series
Whether you use the Base, Pro, or Max, you get the same top-tier gaming specs for PUBG:
1ms Latency: All three models achieve 1ms input lag when running at 1080p/240Hz in Game Mode.
240Hz Refresh Rate: Essential for competitive shooters like PUBG to ensure fluid motion and rapid target tracking.
HDMI 2.1: Standard on all models, providing the high-bandwidth connection needed for Variable Refresh Rate (VRR) and Auto Low Latency Mode (ALLM).
snippet.textOriginal:
Gaming Performance Across the HORIZON 20 Series
Whether you use the Base, Pro, or Max, you get the same top-tier gaming specs for PUBG:
1ms Latency: All three models achieve 1ms input lag when running at 1080p/240Hz in Game Mode.
240Hz Refresh Rate: Essential for competitive shooters like PUBG to ensure fluid motion and rapid target tracking.
HDMI 2.1: Standard on all models, providing the high-bandwidth connection needed for Variable Refresh Rate (VRR) and Auto Low Latency Mode (ALLM).

snippet.textDisplay:
Only short throw laser beamers PREVENT disturbing ventilator noise ruining your immersive video experience. 
As it is placed far in front of you, on the ground or small table, you can even pre cool the air by placing ice packes near the air intakes. Lowering ventilator noise is handy in an extremely hot room.
snippet.textOriginal:
